title: ExperimentRecord
description: The five rule-#9 fields every PR pre-registers, plus an experiment id and replay windows.

id.description: kebab-case experiment id; same shape as a TASKS.md task id.

hypothesis.description: Falsifiable prediction: which observable will move, by how much, why.

success.description: Numeric (or rubric) threshold at or above which the change is kept.

pivot.description: Threshold below which the *approach* is abandoned (not just the change reverted).

measurement.description: Exact runnable shell / OTEL / CI command. No English instructions.

anchor.description: Literature citation justifying the metric's choice and threshold's defensibility.

replay_windows_days.description: Days after merge at which experiment-tracker-v0 re-runs the measurement.

timeout_seconds.description: Per-experiment wall-clock timeout for the measurement command, in seconds. Enforced by ci-experiment-runner-v0. Default 60s; raise for measurements that legitimately require more time (e.g. integration suites).
